title: oxalis oligophylla
intro: Oxalis oligophylla, also known as the desert wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. Oxalis oligophylla has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic agent. The plant's herbal preparations include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
